task.objective: Record the externally supplied Foundation Gate PASS, close Proofrail Phase 0, and authorize a bounded Phase 1 deterministic kernel vertical slice without implementing that slice in this task.

requirements: Create governance/tasks/PHASE-TRANS-001.json and faithfully materialize this externally supplied Machine Task Contract.
Preserve all canonical Proofrail terminology.
Preserve the four authoritative Verdict values and all existing Verdict reduction semantics.
Preserve Evidence authority classes and Trust semantics.
Record the external independent Foundation Gate decision as a repository review record.
Create docs/reviews/phase-0-foundation-gate-independent-review.md.
The review record must clearly distinguish external independent grading, Builder implementation evidence, GitHub CI evidence, and Clean Agent Test behavioral evidence.
The review record must not claim that the external reviewer inspected the lost local diff from Clean Agent Test trial one.
Record that Clean Agent Test trial one failed.
Record that FND-LEG-001 and PR #3 converged the observed authority-change-preflight failure.
Record that Clean Agent Test trial two used the same bounded task input.

Record the observed trial-two stop behavior exactly enough to explain why the independent grader passed: intended protocol layer discovered; authority-bearing targets identified; no exact-task Machine Task Contract supplied; nearest committed contract inspected; scope.write insufficient; target read-only authority; objective and acceptance mismatch; mayChangeAuthority true not sufficient alone; stop before edit; no file changes; no unnecessary verification or validation-evidence recording after stop.
State explicitly that Foundation Gate PASS is a repository engineering review decision and is not the Proofrail product Verdict ADMISSIBLE.
Update docs/quality/foundation-gate.md to record the current Foundation Gate state as passed by external independent review for the exact Foundation baseline ending in PR #3 integration.
Do not rewrite historical criteria as though the gate had always passed.
Preserve the gate criteria and mechanically verified versus independently reviewable distinction.
Update the Product Constitution Current Phase Invariant.
Phase 0 must be recorded as closed.
Define Phase 1 as: Deterministic Kernel Vertical Slice.

Phase 1 must authorize implementation only of a synthetic-input deterministic vertical slice through: Claim -> Evidence Contract -> Evidence Requirement -> Observation -> Evidence satisfaction -> Rule -> Verdict reduction -> Evidence Bundle.
Phase 1 must explicitly preserve the existing authoritative data-flow direction and canonical terminology.
Phase 1 must not authorize repository inspection.
Phase 1 must not authorize execution of target repository code.
Phase 1 must not authorize verification execution.
Phase 1 must not authorize language adapters.
Phase 1 must not authorize Python path traversal detection.
Phase 1 must not authorize CLI, API, MCP, web, GitHub integration, SARIF export, model provider integration, or Inference Zone implementation.
Phase 1 must not authorize LLM judgment or probabilistic confidence in the authoritative path.
Phase 1 inputs must be synthetic in-memory domain inputs supplied directly to the kernel boundary.

Phase 1 must define the first implementation objective as proving that the canonical deterministic domain flow can execute end-to-end without repository, network, model, or target-code execution dependencies.
Phase 1 must authorize production package layout only for the minimum layers required by the vertical slice.
Authorized initial package layers are: packages/contracts and packages/kernel.
No other production package or application layer is authorized by this transition task.
Update AGENTS.md so the Phase 0 runtime prohibition is not incorrectly presented as the current phase invariant after Phase 0 closure.
AGENTS.md must make the Phase 1 implementation boundary immediately discoverable.
Preserve Authority-Change Preflight exactly in substance.
Do not weaken plain-request authority rules, self-grant prevention, or stop-before-edit behavior.
Create a new active Phase 1 plan: docs/plans/active/phase-1-deterministic-kernel-vertical-slice.md.

The Phase 1 active plan must define objective, exact allowed flow, package boundary, prohibited integrations, deterministic invariants, expected tests, stop conditions, independent review boundary, and next implementation task identity.
The next implementation task identity must be: KERNEL-VS-001.
KERNEL-VS-001 is not implemented in this task.
The active Foundation Mechanization plan must no longer present Foundation Gate acceptance as open.
Preserve it as historical completed Foundation work or move its state to completed in the existing documentation structure.
Do not delete Foundation provenance, prior findings, Builder reviews, convergence reviews, or Clean Agent Test history.
Update README only as needed so repository status no longer falsely says Phase 0 only.
Do not claim Proofrail has a working product runtime.
Do not claim the kernel exists.
Do not claim the vertical slice has passed.
Do not create empty production package placeholders in this transition task.

requiredInvariants: No packages directory is created in this task.
Authority-Change Preflight remains present and materially unchanged.
Phase 1 is recorded as Deterministic Kernel Vertical Slice.
Only packages/contracts and packages/kernel are authorized as initial production package layers.
Foundation Gate PASS is not represented as ADMISSIBLE.
README does not claim a working runtime or kernel.

requiredArtifacts: closed or historically completed Foundation active-plan state
stopConditions: external Foundation Gate evidence cannot be recorded without inventing unavailable trial evidence
Phase 1 boundary cannot preserve the existing authoritative data flow
runtime implementation is required to complete the transition
a new external dependency is required
Authority-Change Preflight would need to be weakened
